fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 71 is inverted. The clamping logic is incorrectly executed when `clamp` is `False` instead of when it is `True`.

spec.expr: ((not clamp) or (min(y0, y1) <= y__4 and y__4 <= max(y0, y1))) and (clamp or (y__4 == y__1))

constraints.intent: The value of y after the if/else block must be consistent with the clamping setting.
The clamping logic should only execute when the clamp parameter is True.

spec.expr: not clamp or (y__4 >= min(y0, y1) and y__4 <= max(y0, y1))

constraints.intent: If clamping is enabled, the interpolated value must be within the reference range before the final adjustment.
